## Meeting purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Ryan Mendenhall to discuss their professional backgrounds and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both have extensive SEO/marketing backgrounds; now focused on AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) rapidly scaled to $1M ARR in 3 months with AI-powered content services](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Discussed potential for Ryan to get involved with fwd.digital's growth plans](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of human expertise + AI tools for high-quality, efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

## Topics

### Professional Backgrounds

  - [Ryan: Career focused on SEO/marketing; started/sold agency; worked at Disney](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Marcel: Recently left CMO role to focus on fwd.digital; background in marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

### AI-Powered Content Creation

  - [fwd.digital producing 100k words/month for clients at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Utilizes AI + human editors/experts for high-quality, efficient output](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Developed workflows combining data analysis, customer understanding, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Business Model & Growth

  - [fwd.digital reached $1M ARR in 3 months without active marketing](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
  - [Pricing: \~$9k/month for 100k words; potential to scale to $27-36k/month per client](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Expanding beyond just content into case studies, social posts, sales enablement, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Marcel open to exploring ways to involve Ryan in fwd.digital's growth](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Seeking experienced professionals to help scale operations and improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding high-leverage US-based talent + offshore teams for execution](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

### Industry Trends & Challenges

  - [Discussed limitations of "black box" AI content tools](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Importance of strategic thinking, customer understanding in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Potential for AI to revolutionize various marketing/content tasks (e.g., site audits)](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to follow up with Ryan to explore potential collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Ryan to consider attending fwd.digital's workshop ($500) to learn more about their processes](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Both to continue conversation around how Ryan's experience might fit with fwd.digital's growth plans](https://fathom.video/share/MMYxa5p4NqndvyUrEjqxbzynWCEftL2c?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
